pattern.rationale: src/features/<feature>/ slice with co-located view, hook, three tests, and a documented barrel; main.tsx + App.tsx compose above. Graph community 23 isolates exactly this slice (cohesion 0.22). Matches .agents/project/ARCHITECTURE.md.

godNodes.label: ThresholdCounter()
godNodes.note: largest source-code hub; ~6x under godModule threshold

communities.label: Threshold-Counter Feature
communities.note: the only source-code community; highest-cohesion non-trivial cluster in the graph

evidence: graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md (Import Cycles: None detected)
DFS over file-level import subgraph: main.tsx -> App.tsx -> index.ts -> ThresholdCounter.tsx -> useThresholdCounter.ts (strict DAG)
checks.gap: None. The graph confirms a strict tree with zero back-edges across the 8 source files / 15 source nodes.

evidence: src/features/threshold-counter/index.ts:4 (barrel re-exports ThresholdCounter)
src/App.tsx:1 (imports from './features/threshold-counter', the barrel, not a deep path)
checks.expectation: Each feature folder exposes a barrel (index.ts) and external imports go through it.
checks.gap: None for the one existing feature. The graph's App.tsx->ThresholdCounter.tsx edge is a resolved/transitive edge through the barrel re-export, not a deep-path bypass; the source import string targets the folder root.
checks.remediation: None required. Discipline proven for one feature with one external consumer; unobserved at scale.

evidence: grep '../../../' and '../../' across src/ returns zero matches; all intra-feature imports are single-level siblings
checks.expectation: Relative imports go up at most two levels.

evidence: src/features/ contains a single child, threshold-counter/; community 23 is the only source community, so no sibling-feature edges exist to violate
checks.expectation: Sibling features import each other only through public entry points.
checks.gap: Structural prerequisite absent: only one feature. The rule is documented in ARCHITECTURE.md rule 1, but the graph confirms there are no cross-feature edges to evaluate.
checks.remediation: Re-evaluate when a second feature lands; the graph will then expose any sibling-to-internals edge directly.

evidence: no packages/ directory; pnpm-workspace.yaml carries only allowBuilds/advisory overrides
checks.expectation: Internal packages import only from each other's published entry points.
checks.gap: N/A — not a monorepo. Skipped per SKILL.md.

evidence: Top whole-graph hubs are doc concepts: Quality Gate (8), Feature-Folder Architecture (7), Definition of Done (6), Behaviour Map (6)
Largest source-code hub: ThresholdCounter() at 5 edges; max source file fan-in 4 (ThresholdCounter.tsx)
checks.expectation: No module has fan-in greater than 30.
checks.gap: None. The most-connected code node (5 edges) is ~6x under threshold; no source module approaches god-node status.

evidence: ThresholdCounter() inbound importers/renderers: App.tsx (the one real render parent), index.ts (barrel re-export), ThresholdCounter.test.tsx, ThresholdCounter.a11y.test.tsx — 4 total, of which exactly 1 is a rendering parent
checks.expectation: No component is rendered by more than 25 parents.
checks.gap: None. One rendering parent (App.tsx); far below threshold.

evidence: Largest TS/TSX source: ThresholdCounter.test.tsx 52, useThresholdCounter.ts 47, ThresholdCounter.tsx 46, useThresholdCounter.test.ts 44, App.tsx/main.tsx 15, a11y.test 12, index.ts 4
Max source file fan-out is App.tsx = 2 (App.tsx -> index.ts, resolved to ThresholdCounter.tsx); ThresholdCounter.tsx fan-out = 1 (-> useThresholdCounter.ts)
checks.expectation: No component imports more than 15 modules.
checks.gap: None. Max fan-out 2, far below threshold.

evidence: Every src/ file is reachable from main.tsx via the import graph. Files with inbound=0 are exactly the legitimate roots: main.tsx (entry), the three test files, and the index.ts barrel (reached by App.tsx)
GRAPH_REPORT's 492 isolated nodes are audit-report fields and config leaves, not source modules
checks.expectation: Every source file is reachable from at least one entry point.

evidence: package.json dependencies: react, react-dom only (no Redux/Zustand/Jotai/MobX/Recoil/Valtio/TanStack/SWR)
useThresholdCounter.ts uses useState/useMemo/useCallback only
checks.gap: None. React local state, single coherent strategy.

evidence: grep for fetch(/axios/XMLHttpRequest in src/ returns zero matches; no data fetching exists. ARCHITECTURE.md explicitly defers a data layer.
checks.expectation: Server state lives in a designated data-fetching layer, not component useEffect+fetch.
checks.gap: Structural prerequisite absent: no data fetching anywhere. Deliberate per ARCHITECTURE.md 'intentionally omits'.
checks.remediation: When a data layer is added, give it its own boundary (e.g. src/shared/api) per ARCHITECTURE.md.

evidence: grep 'export let' in src/ returns zero matches; module-level exports are const (WARNING_THRESHOLD, CRITICAL_THRESHOLD) and pure functions/types
checks.expectation: No top-level let exports holding mutable state.

evidence: No localStorage/sessionStorage/document.cookie/window.* in src/. The one DOM access (document.getElementById('root')) is in main.tsx, the composition root, and fails loudly if #root is missing
checks.expectation: Components do not touch browser storage/cookie/window directly.
checks.gap: None. The single DOM read lives at the composition root, not in a component.

evidence: Vite-React, not Next.js App Router; 'use client' does not apply
checks.gap: N/A — not Next.js App Router. Skipped per SKILL.md.

evidence: folder threshold-counter (kebab-case); ThresholdCounter.tsx (PascalCase); useThresholdCounter.ts (useCamelCase, same-name); tests <Name>.test.tsx / .a11y.test.tsx co-located; constants SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE; types PascalCase. No outliers vs CONVENTIONS.md.
checks.expectation: Files match the dominant naming pattern in their directory.

evidence: The single feature folder matches the canonical shape prescribed in ARCHITECTURE.md (view + hook + tests + barrel)
checks.expectation: Directories of the same kind follow the same convention.
checks.gap: None — trivially satisfied with one feature; the instantiated template is correct.

evidence: The one feature folder has a barrel (index.ts); no second feature to be inconsistent with. Convention codified in ARCHITECTURE.md rule 3 and CONVENTIONS.md.
checks.expectation: If barrels are used in any feature folder, they are used in every feature folder.

evidence: src/features/threshold-counter/index.ts:1-3 now carries a 3-line doc comment naming the public surface and stating that the hook and pure rules are private, with a pointer to ARCHITECTURE.md
checks.expectation: Each feature's index.ts has a documenting comment describing its public surface, or the folder has a README.md.
checks.gap: None. The previously-undocumented barrel is now documented; the soft check resolves to present and sets the template future features copy.
checks.remediation: None required. Keep the same doc-comment convention in every future barrel.
